appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md: documented that keyboard.rs global match arm ordering is a critical design constraint — global branches must intercept and return false before View-specific match to prevent double-sending. Also updated Toast priority note (no longer intercepts keys).

rejectedObservations.observation: crossterm 的 Space 键使用 KeyCode::Char(' ') 而非单独的 KeyCode 常量，值得文档化
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented via code pattern: all tests and production code consistently use KeyCode::Char(' '). This is a crossterm library detail, not a project convention that workers need to know.
